"You don't need to shrink yourself to fit into someone else's plan. You were built for more — and it's time you started acting like it." — Nik, Evolve with Nik
Meet Nik

I've Been Where You Are.

I'm a Certified Self Care Coach and Mental Health First Aid Certified Peer Support Specialist — but more than any title, I'm a woman who's lived through the heartbreak, the settling, the losing herself, and the beautiful, hard work of finding her way back.

I spent years pouring into relationships and situations that were never meant for me. I gave too much, too soon, to the wrong people — and I paid for it in years, in peace, and in pieces of myself I had to go back and reclaim.

Now I use everything I went through to help women like you see their worth, set their standards, and stop settling for a life that's less than what God designed for them.

Whether it's through courses, coaching, or just real talk from a woman who's been through it — I'm here for all of it.

Peer Support · For Women Only · Not Therapy

Reset & Refocus — A Taste of What's Coming

Feeling overwhelmed, stuck, or just need someone to actually listen without judgment? This is where it starts. These weekly peer support sessions are your bridge to the full 1-on-1 coaching experience that's arriving very soon.

Each session is 1 full hour, one-on-one, just you and me — real, honest, and completely judgment-free. We'll work together to calm your thoughts, build simple habits, create a personalized plan, and make sure you feel fully supported every single week.

Think of it as your weekly reset — because you deserve someone in your corner who actually gets it.

  • ✦ 1 full hour weekly 1-on-1 call — just you and Nik
  • ✦ Personalized action plan built around your life
  • ✦ Check-ins between sessions so you never feel alone
  • ✦ Safe space to vent, heal, and refocus — no judgment ever
$20/hour · weekly

Peer support only · Not therapy · For women only
